tracks.meaning: to direct attention, effort, or concentration toward something specific
the center of interest or activity; the state of concentrated attention
the point at which rays of light converge after passing through a lens or reflecting off a mirror
the point of maximum intensity of an infection, disease, or medical condition in the body
to adjust a camera, microscope, or other optical instrument to produce a clear image
to direct computational or processing resources toward a specific task or target
to concentrate organizational efforts or strategy on a particular market, product, or objective
to regain concentration or mental clarity after distraction
